chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Crl.B.A.No.S-322 of 2024 (Khadim Hussain Vs. The State) DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For the hearing of the bail application. 04.07.2024. Mr. Syed Fida Hussain Shah, Advocate for the applicant. Mr. Aitbar Ali Bullo, D.P.G for the State. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- IRSHAD ALI SHAH, J;- It is alleged that on arrest from the applicant was secured an unlicensed pistol of 30 bore with a magazine, by the police party of P.S A-Section Kandhkot, led by HC Ali Murad, for which the present case was registered. 2. The applicant on refusal of bail by learned Sessions Judge, Kashmore @ Kandhkot, has sought the same from this Court by way of instant application u/s. 497 Cr. PC. 3. Heard arguments and perused the record. 4. There is no independent witness to the incident. The police encounter whereby the applicant was apprehended, proved to be ineffective. The recovery is alleged by the applicant to have been foisted upon him by the police. The case has been challaned finally and there is no likelihood of absconsion or tampering with the evidence on the part of the applicant. In these circumstances, a case for the release of the applicant on bail on point of further inquiry is made out. 5. Under the discussed circumstances, the applicant is admitted to bail subject to his furnishing surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the learned trial Court. 6. The instant bail application is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE
